source_notes: Representative no-network workload derived from recent Sprint 7 and Sprint 8 artifact shapes.

scenarios.title: UI Lifecycle Variant clarification
scenarios.prompt: Ask one decision-quality clarification question at a time and recommend a default.

scenarios.title: ADO/GitHub bridge spec synthesis
scenarios.prompt: Write goals, non-goals, requirements, acceptance criteria, and traceability for an issue-sync bridge.

scenarios.title: Model upgrade plan and tasks
scenarios.prompt: Decompose the approved model-upgrade protocol plan into atomic implementation tasks.

scenarios.title: Implementation close report
scenarios.prompt: Summarize implementation evidence, tests, validation counts, files changed, and owner attention items.

scenarios.title: Spec compliance and quality review
scenarios.prompt: Review whether an implementation matches the locked validation contract and identify residual risk.
